text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 01 = Pharmacy — facility or location where drugs and other medically related items and services are 
 sold, dispensed, or otherwise provided directly to patients 
02 = Telehealth provided other than in patient’s home (eff. 1/2017) 
03 = School — facility whose primary purpose is education 
04 = Homeless shelter — a facility or location whose primary purpose is to provide temporary housing 
to homeless individuals (e.g., emergency shelters,
